inputs.titre: Description de la variole par Rhazès

reason: The image depicts a man, presumably Rhazes, writing in a dimly lit room. The clothing, stone walls, oil lamp, and lack of modern technology suggest an environment consistent with the 9th century. The window structure seems plausible, but I cannot assure 100% accuracy. The overall impression conveys an atmosphere of historical plausibility. Some details might be stylized, but the core elements align with the intended period.
